When he first appears, he's a surly teenager, but <strong>Muten Rôshi's</strong> training and life spent alongside <strong>Goku</strong> will help him grow wiser. He is originally quite a jealous and selfish person, so he does not respect <strong>Muten Rôshi's</strong> rules during his training. After a short rivalry with <strong>Son Gokû</strong>, he will become her best friend. Thanks to <strong>Son Gokû</strong>, he gradually becomes benevolent. In films mainly, <strong>Krillin</strong> is often used as a comic element. Although iconic and very strong, he is surpassed by many characters in the series, such as <strong>Piccolo</strong> or All <strong>Saiyans</strong>.</p>
